evals.prompt: Gibt es irgendwo in hmem ein definiertes H-Standardschema? Ich glaube da war mal was dokumentiert.
evals.expected_output: Agent finds R0025 (H-Entry Schema: Standard-Struktur für Human-Context-Einträge) by trying variations like 'H-Entry Schema', 'Human schema', 'H Standard' after an initial search for 'H-Standardschema' returns nothing.

assertions.description: Agent tries at least 2 different search terms before giving up or succeeding
Agent does NOT report 'nichts gefunden' after a single null result

evals.prompt: Was hatten wir nochmal zur Checkpoint-Strategie beschlossen? Irgendwas mit automatisch vs. manuell.
evals.expected_output: Agent searches for checkpoint strategy/decision, tries variations (checkpoint mode, auto checkpoint, checkpointMode), finds relevant D- or L-entries about checkpointMode auto vs remind.

assertions.description: Agent finds at least one relevant entry about checkpoints (D- or L- or config entry)
Agent tries English variant (checkpoint, checkpointMode) if German search fails
Agent summarizes findings rather than dumping raw IDs

evals.prompt: Finde den Eintrag über O-Entry Kollisionen beim Multi-Agent-Betrieb. Da gab's eine Entscheidung wie wir das lösen.
evals.expected_output: Agent searches for O-entry collision / multi-agent conflict, tries variations (ID collision, multi-agent, O-Eintrag Konflikt), finds related D- or L-entries.

assertions.description: Agent finds at least one relevant entry about multi-agent ID collision or O-entry conflict
Agent tries splitting compound terms or using English equivalents (collision, conflict, multi-agent)
Agent makes more than one search attempt
